This is a wdspec test.
[FAIL] test_set_to_user_context_and_then_to_context
  AssertionError: assert 'America/Los_Angeles' == 'Asia/Yekaterinburg'
[FAIL] test_set_to_context_and_then_to_user_context
  AssertionError: assert 'Europe/Berlin' == 'Asia/Yekaterinburg'
